overview: VKD Tax Services is a professional multi-role tax services platform for managing Income Tax Return and eTDS Return filings. It features role-based dashboards for owners, staff, and clients — with a service request queue, PNG proof upload with AI verification, and company information management.
features: Multi-page layout with separate pages for Home, Services, About, Contact, Owner Panel, and Client Portal
Role-based dashboards for owner, staff, and client accounts
Service request queue — clients submit requests, staff pick them up from the queue
Staff uploads PNG proof of completed work; AI automatically verifies the proof before client can view it
Owner panel to create and manage staff accounts, view all requests, and update company address
Contact page with WhatsApp logo, phone number, and company address in Nanded, Maharashtra
